    "id": 1,
    "instruction": "Each correct answer presents part of the solution. Choose two.",
    "question": "What are the potential risks associated with relying heavily on code generated from GitHub Copilot?",
    "options": {
      "A": "GitHub Copilot may introduce security vulnerabilities by suggesting code with known exploits.",
      "B": "GitHub Copilot may decrease developer velocity by requiring too much time in prompt engineering.",
      "C": "GitHub Copilot's suggestions may not always reflect best practices or the latest coding standards.",
      "D": "GitHub Copilot may increase development lead time by providing irrelevant suggestions."

    "correct": ["A","C"]

      "D": "GitHub Copilot rejects all prompts involving deprecated features to avoid compilation errors."

    "question": "What are the effects of content exclusions?",
    "options": {
      "A": "Excluded content is not directly available as context",
      "B": "Copilot suggestions unavailable inside excluded files",
      "C": "Excluded content is not used while debugging",
      "D": "IDE will not count suggestions in excluded content"
    },
    "correct": ["A", "B"]
  },
  {
    "id": 115,
    "instruction": "Choose one.",
    "question": "How long do content exclusions take to apply?",
    "options": {
      "A": "Up to 30 minutes",
      "B": "45–60 minutes",
      "C": "60–90 minutes",
      "D": "24 hours"
    },
    "correct": ["A"]
  },

    "correct": ["C"]
